mapper.sql: select id, quote_code, supplier_id, supplier_code, supplier_name, quote_date, currency, tax_included, status, effective_date, expire_date, source_type, source_reference, approved_by, approved_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from purchase_supplier_quote
mapper.select: select id, quote_id, line_no, material_id, material_code, material_name, spec, unit, min_order_quantity, min_quantity, max_quantity, unit_price, tax_rate, lead_time_days, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from purchase_supplier_quote_line where quote_id = #{quoteId} order by line_no
mapper.insert: insert into purchase_supplier_quote( quote_code, supplier_id, supplier_code, supplier_name, quote_date, currency, tax_included, status, effective_date, expire_date, source_type, source_reference, remark, create_by, create_time) values ( #{quoteCode}, #{supplierId}, #{supplierCode}, #{supplierName}, #{quoteDate}, #{currency}, #{taxIncluded}, #{status}, #{effectiveDate}, #{expireDate}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceReference}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now())
mapper.update: update purchase_supplier_quote set quote_code = #{quoteCode}, supplier_id = #{supplierId}, supplier_code = #{supplierCode}, supplier_name = #{supplierName}, quote_date = #{quoteDate}, currency = #{currency}, tax_included = #{taxIncluded}, effective_date = #{effectiveDate}, expire_date = #{expireDate}, source_type = #{sourceType}, source_reference = #{sourceReference}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from purchase_supplier_quote where id in #{id}
delete from purchase_supplier_quote_line where quote_id in #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into purchase_supplier_quote_line( quote_id, line_no, material_id, material_code, material_name, spec, unit, min_order_quantity, min_quantity, max_quantity, unit_price, tax_rate, lead_time_days, remark, create_by, create_time) values ( #{quoteId}, #{lineNo}, #{materialId}, #{materialCode}, #{materialName}, #{spec}, #{unit}, #{minOrderQuantity}, #{minQuantity}, #{maxQuantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{taxRate}, #{leadTimeDays}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now())
mapper.select: select ql.material_code as materialCode, q.supplier_id as supplierId, q.supplier_code as supplierCode, q.supplier_name as supplierName, q.id as quoteId, ql.id as quoteLineId, q.quote_code as quoteCode, ql.unit_price as unitPrice, ql.tax_rate as taxRate, case when q.tax_included = 'Y' then true else false end as taxIncluded, q.currency as currency, case when q.tax_included = 'Y' then ql.unit_price else ql.unit_price * (1 + ql.tax_rate / 100) end as comparableUnitPrice, ql.unit_price * #{quantity} as totalAmount, ql.lead_time_days as leadTimeDays, q.expire_date as expireDate from purchase_supplier_quote q inner join purchase_supplier_quote_line ql on ql.quote_id = q.id inner join supplier s on s.id = q.supplier_id where q.status = 'APPROVED' and s.status = 'NORMAL' and q.currency = #{currency} and ql.material_code = #{materialCode} and ql.min_order_quantity <= #{quantity} and (ql.min_quantity is null or ql.min_quantity <= #{quantity}) and (ql.max_quantity is null or ql.max_quantity >= #{quantity}) and q.effective_date <= #{requiredDate} and (q.expire_date is null or q.expire_date >= #{requiredDate}) order by comparableUnitPrice asc, ql.lead_time_days asc, q.quote_date desc, q.id desc limit 50
mapper.update: update purchase_supplier_quote set status = #{targetStatus}, approved_by = case when #{targetStatus} = 'APPROVED' then #{operator} else approved_by end, approved_time = case when #{targetStatus} = 'APPROVED' then now() else approved_time end, update_by = #{operator}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and status = #{sourceStatus}
